parsed_output.justification: The discussion repeatedly points toward Justin as a suspect. Additionally, Justin claimed one of the roles as a robber; if he swapped during the night, his ending role could indeed be werewolf. The lackof clear confirmation for any other suspect, combined with repeated accusations aimed at Justin, makes him the most reasonable choice.
